name: discord
description: Discord chat — exposes channels, members, message stream, and the composer for DMs and server channels.
notes: Routes by URL: discord.com/channels/@me is the DM list, /@me/<id> is a DM conversation, /<serverId>/<channelId> is a server channel. The composer is a textbox whose accessible name starts with 'Message #' (server channel) or 'Message @' (DM). Boolean ARIA properties (checked/selected/expanded) are normalized from CDP's stringy 'true'/'false' values into real booleans so consumers can use === true safely.
